basic_details.job_title: Konkan Railway – Project Engineer, Technician and More – 36 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Konkan Railway Corporation Limited (KRCL) will recruit 36 posts on fixed term contract basis, which will be filled through KRCL Recruitment 2026. Interested candidates can attend walk-in interview on 22 June and 23 June 2026 at Visakhapatnam. Check details like eligibility, salary, walk-in date, vacancy & more from the article.

seo_tags: Konkan Railway Corporation Limited Recruitment 2026 Notification Out For 36 Posts, Walk-In Interview
